reviews.review_description: The audio is glitchy so everything seems like it plays 2 or 3 times per audio bite. The overall game play is really fun. The depth is great to make you feel like you are really in some type of cyber tank. I only found one player for a few minutes so far but that's only with a couple hours of play maybe. I thought this game was originally a multi arena battle style. I believe that will come but this will be epic when you can have team death match and capture the flag modes. The audio is painful and I would give this 3 stars for that but the rest of the game is promising and earns 4 stars.

developer_response.body:
Hi JusticeDelta, and thanks for your kind review. Audio issues should be solved with the new update and the new battle mode (among other surprises) it's coming really really soon.

Stay tuned at http://fusionwars.com/blog to know everything about the game.

reviews.review_title: Pretty sweet so far. TRON tank battle
reviews.review_description:
Pretty sweet. Ever wanted to tank battle TRON style? Nuff said

If it's not working with ur Note 4, a new patch will be out soon. They have optimized perfomance for Note 4 (removing some features) but it's definitely worth it to make it playable. Support is good. send them a bug report if u have issues

Cross platform multiplayer sounds cool

developer_response.body:
The new update with the fix for Note 4 is ONLINE!

Thanks livewire120v for your kind review and your help testing the new version. You have been really helpful !

reviews.review_description: The immersion of this game is the best i had till today. Because this, the game is really fun. Its a really good game.. If now a online multiplayer with like 10 players on each Team and big maps are would coming too.. This would be the best VR game ever. The difficulty is hard but hey.. Training makes the best ;)  Very good job @ devs :)!

Usually in that kind of game i am sick ! But here the system work pretty well.
Nice work guys for the work you have done.

I played multiple VR games but with this one I have a quite high motion sickness. Can't play more than a beginner level.
Also the controls are quite complicated. I changed it to the second layout which I like much more but I think acceleration should be on the same d pad as direction.
I hope the motion sickness gets improved a lot.

developer_response.body:
Hi MHolla, so sorry to hear that. You can try adjusting the Confort in the options panel to see if it helps. Our game is a bit intense due to the speed of the vehicles and the fast action. 

Anyway we are working on further anti sickness measures so stay tuned on fusionwars.com for the new updates. We hope you can enjoy the game soon and be back fighting in no time!

reviews.review_description:
The foĺlowing opinion is intended for potential buyers and is not addressed at the developer.

The graphics are great. I just don't find the control scheme and therefoe your ability to maneuver and target enemies very satisfying. The 'turbo' button is the only method of moving forward. You need to move forward in bursts and use the brake so you dont overshoot your trajectory.  The 'slide' button doesnt slide you left or right (AKA 'strafe') but rotates you at the end of a forward burst. I haven't tried mutiplayer, only the lacklustre and linear single player.

Panzer Panic is a traditional tank game also worth consideration. Graphics not as gòod. Has traditional 2 stick control scheme which is harder to use at the start but gives more maneuverability once mastered. Also 1 stick simple control available. Single player is sandbox and AI friendlies and foes dynamically traverse for objectives which makes it a tactical game.
Hard to beat a game like this. The sense of scale and smooth game play is spot on. Cant wait till more people start playing as the multiplayer would be intense.
just cheaper but just as fun praise Jesus
It really needs mappable controlls but otherwise awesome.

developer_response.body:
Hi Nightelfmohwawk91, thanks for your kind review. Don't worry, we already have implemented a Mappable Custom Controllers section. It will be included, among LOTS of new things, in the new BIG Update coming REALLY SOON.

Stay tuned on http://fusionwars.com/blog for the latest updates!

reviews.review_description: With a great gameplay and very fun chat mode if you play with others
This is my favorite game for gear vr yet.  I just want to try out the multiplayer now!  Add me "danpb" and let's play!
Super immersive, awesome graphics. Tiny bit of lag in the audio, but almost unnoticeable. S8 phone and new gear vr. Just fyi

Kudos for having the guts to require gamepad. The more titles come out that require it, the more people will buy one, which expands developer options. 

However, I would like more freedom to define the controls. For example, I expected to be able to strafe using the left stick and turn using the right like in Battlezone. I cannot.

Alternatively, a scheme with legit tank controls where left stick controls left tread and right stick controls right tread might be cool.

Having the cockpit structure close up really makes the 3D pop and helps prevent the game from feeling flat due to involving mostly huge scenery and distant enemies. Good call.

Overall a fun and well made game, only needing a little more polish to shine more brightly.

This game is loads of fun.  I can't wait to see more people playing this.  One suggestion though! Not everyone has a lot of vr friends. If it would be possible to have a fusion wars forum so that players who own the game could link up easier and coordinate co-op sessions,  that would be cool. I think it would help bring the community together a bit more,  further emphasizing not gaming alone :)

Aside from that,  awesome game so far.  Keep up the great work.  Looking forward to future updates!
This game is a must have if you have a vr

reviews.review_title: And this is just the early release.
reviews.review_description: After seeing the previews and reading some reviews I took a chance and bought it. Really only paid $1.99 since I had a $5 credit. At first, the game ran like crap. But after reseting my phone it ran like a charm with minor jitters. Galaxy S6 over here. It is probably the closes thing on feeling like you're in Tron and I like that. The controls are pretty legit and I'm okay with it. I'm using a PS3 controller and everything works fine. Manage to get about a good 30 or so mins of play with no overheating interruption, thanks to the Asterion Satori VR Fan from Amazon for my Gear VR. Motion sickness don't bother me too much, so I turn the comfort deal off because I want the full experience and feeling. For it to be an early release I'm giving it a lot of credit. Not really anything in the game that bothers me, but as said, it is an early release. So I'm sure updates are right around the corner for it. If you want to feel like you're in Tron playing a tank battle game, here it is right here. If you get motion sickness easily then use the comfort mode or stay away from this game. Aside from that, definitely worth it in my book.

Hey guys! I downloaded a new update to my Gear Vr last night and it seems to have fixed all my issues, all of them. Every app is running right now, including yours! Once again, great game, truly. Your customer service ain't too shabby either. Thanks again for sticking with me through this.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE2: Thanks for reporting it! 

UPDATE: Email sent. If you didn't receive it please write us at support@fusionwars.com or via fusionwars.com/feedback. Thanks for your help and support!

The S8 AUDIO PROBLEM should be SOLVED as reported by other users. Did you try resetting the phone? It helped other users. 

Anyway if it does't work please write us again (http://fusionwars.com/feedback) and we will do our best to definitively solve the problem.

Thanks for your help!

reviews.review_title: Update: Does not work with my controller
reviews.review_description: Can not play this game cause it not support my Snakebyte idroid Controller :( This Controller works on so many games but not on this. Please fix it. Update: Found a workaround by remapping my controller with tincore keymapper.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE:
NOW you can map your controls however you want. Just go to Controls in the main menu and select Custom. All the feedback about it will be appreciated and very helpful.

ORIGINAL:
Hi SaschaG82. Great to hear that you found a solution. Anyway we are implementing a new Map Controls option so you can assign your own buttons settings to avoid the need of external apps.

You can see the state of this and all our updates in the new Forum http://fusionwars.com/forum. Stay tuned !

reviews.review_description: Great game with my gameoad now with Hear VR controller support can't wait to try it

Played this for about 20 mins and got a bit of motion sickness but only because turning with the stick is very choppy, i.e low frame rate. It's only when turning, general looking around is very smooth. Comfort mode reduces the harshness by blacking out your peripheral vision when turning but its not a good solution, the turning motion needs to be smooth.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jonmacf, thanks for your review. With the new Update the game runs a lot smoother and should help reduce any motion sickness.

See you in the battle!
